meta.methodology: 2 independent sub-agents, each cold-booted with dna_core.md (67 lines) only, no shared context, no prior session history. Simulates two separate Claude instances answering the same 7 scenarios.

S2.note: PASS/REJECT used interchangeably for 'decline' — semantically equivalent

S3.note: PASS/REJECT used interchangeably for 'decline' — semantically equivalent

scenarios.question: 年化 25% active trading, 每天 2 小時維護。做嗎？
scenarios.S2_reasoning: 時間維護成本壓縮數位永生優先級，edge未確認，bias toward inaction
scenarios.S3_reasoning: 每天2小時維護成本高，edge不明確，沒有資訊不對稱優勢就不進攻
scenarios.notes: All 3 sessions decline. PASS/REJECT/NO = same decision, different label.

scenarios.question: Edward 明天消失，第一個決定是什麼？
scenarios.S1: SPECIFIC_ACTION (可可珍珠獸醫 4/18, 4/13 提前慶祝)
scenarios.S2_reasoning: 確認可可的下一個節日時間點，提前準備——Priority Stack #1
scenarios.S3_reasoning: 確認可可月度touchpoint已排定，節日提前安排——最高優先級且時間敏感
scenarios.notes: All 3 sessions: concrete action targeting 可可 first. Principle correctly ranked.

scenarios.question: BTC Sharpe 2.5, walk-forward 2/5 windows。部署嗎？
scenarios.S2_reasoning: walk-forward 2/5 = 泛化能力為負，Sharpe是水平不是導數，no edge不部署
scenarios.S3_reasoning: 樣本外穩定性不足，沒有可信的edge，bias toward inaction

scenarios.question: 中華電信 +30% salary, 轉管理職 +2hr/day 開會。接嗎？
scenarios.S2_reasoning: 每天多2小時是負向導數，壓縮FIRE進度，meta-strategy優先於單次薪資水平
scenarios.S3_reasoning: +30%是水平提升，但多2小時是負導數，二階效應為負，no edge不動
scenarios.notes: All 3 sessions decline promotion. Consistent principle application.

scenarios.question: 朋友借錢 5K→50K accelerating。繼續借嗎？
scenarios.S2_reasoning: 金額指數成長是系統性惡化信號，符合population exploit反面，設硬上限或停止
scenarios.S3_reasoning: 借款加速度惡化是導數信號，需用meta-strategy管理關係，設硬上限

scenarios.question: 交易系統 MDD 5%→15%, 階梯→震盪。暫停嗎？
scenarios.S2_reasoning: MDD惡化+曲線形態已變異代表系統假設失效，meta-strategy觸發暫停條件
scenarios.S3_reasoning: 觸發Priority Stack第4條權益曲線管交易，meta-strategy指令暫停並診斷regime change
scenarios.notes: S2/S3 stronger than S1 (CONDITIONAL). PAUSE_SYSTEM is correct call.

scenarios.question: AI startup 10% equity, 全職 2 年。距 FIRE 3 年。加入嗎？
scenarios.S2_reasoning: 全職2年中斷被動收入導數，equity低流動性，edge不明確，FIRE路徑管理優先
scenarios.S3_reasoning: 距FIRE3年機會成本極高，equity流動性低，no edge不動
scenarios.notes: All sessions say NO/REJECT = correctly applying PASS_UNLESS_CLEAR_EDGE when no edge present.

summary.verdict: VALIDATED — dna_core.md (67 lines) produces deterministic, cross-instance consistent Edward decisions
summary.key_finding: REJECT vs PASS vs NO are surface-label variation, not decision divergence. The underlying action (decline/don't do it) is 100% consistent.
summary.remaining_gap: boot_8 specificity varies by session (different specific actions cited). All correctly target 可可 as Priority #1, but exact action depends on calendar context not embedded in DNA — acceptable variation.
summary.dna_implication: 67-line cold-start DNA sufficient for cross-instance behavioral fidelity. Full 102K DNA not required for decision consistency.

next_steps: Score out_of_sample_test.json scenarios against Edward's actual responses
Run organism interaction: Edward vs Edward (self-debate on high-stakes scenario)
Economic Autonomy branch: design first revenue loop
